body: ERADICATION is a team-based PvE shooter on Roblox where squads fight to reclaim a town overrun by Whiskorians, once-ordinary townspeople who spent too long online and changed into something else. The transformation gave them anthropomorphic, feral features: whiskers, tails, claws. Survivors coined the nickname Whiskorian as a cruel joke. The name stuck.

Players are contractors hired to push the Whiskorians back and take the town, block by block. The threat escalates as matches progress, and the mountain past the fog at the edge of the map. Whiskspire, hides something the briefings won't talk about.
features: Team-based PvE against escalating Whiskorian waves
Territory control across a full reclaimable town
Deep weapon sandbox with vehicles, helicopters, and tactical loadouts
Layered map with a gated frontier zone and a hidden boss encounter
Regular balance updates and seasonal content

body: Favela '94 is a close-quarters tactical shooter set in the tight alleyways and rooftops of a 1994 Brazilian favela. Every engagement is pretty personal, map knowledge and positioning are everything.
Currently in preview. Expect rough edges, rapid updates, and a dev that's watching closely.
DON POLLO OBBY is a tuff obstacle course built around the legend of Don Pollo. Dumb easy stages, you just hearing Don Pollo in the back 🥀🥀😭
This game has been sunset. It remains playable as a piece of Low Quality Interactive history.
